{"comments": "Weekly Operations Report

Branch: President Kennedy
Date: 03 March 2026

Good morning,

Please find this week’s operational priorities:

High Priority
Fix leaking kitchen tap
Schedule professional hood deep cleaning
Inspect and repair back heater

Maintenance
Clean entrance floor vent
Repair wall scratches (back area)
Fix cabinet under sink
Organize or conceal music station cables

Improvements
Add decoration near front window
Cover space above hood
Provide 2 NFC Google review cards (kitchen & cash)

Please confirm scheduling for high-priority items first.

Thank you.
